text: Initiates deep protocol inspection on the flow.
This rule allows traffic for core networking services
Tenant Restrictions Core Networking Allow Rule - DnsCache
This is the default inbound filter which blocks or permits traffic based on user configured settings
This is the UWP Default Inbound Block filter. This filter blocks any inbound packets to UWP apps that do not have the correct capability tokens for listening to a resource.
This is the default outbound filter which blocks or permits traffic based on user configured default settings
This is the UWP Default Outbound Block filter. This filter blocks any outbound packets from UWP apps that do not have the correct capability tokens for the resource they are trying to reach.
AppContainer Outbound Network Access In Server Container Default Rule
AppContainer Inbound Network Access In Server Container Default Rule
AppContainer Loopback Capability Compartment-based Default Rule for Inbound Connections
Blocks all inbound traffic for services who have been network hardened
Blocks all outbound traffic for services who have been network hardened
